new_claims.claim_text: Eric Swalwell is facing a criminal investigation in New York for sexual misconduct, including rape, with one accuser being a former staffer.
new_claims.notes: Web search confirms criminal investigation and allegations from former staffer. Swalwell denies allegations.

new_claims.claim_text: China provided Iran with live satellite imagery and BeiDou navigation data, enabling Iran to track every move of the USS Gerald R. Ford and USS Abraham Lincoln.
new_claims.notes: Claim from X account. Requires independent verification.
